ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., APPL, TSLA, MSFT) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock is listed */,
  "market_capitalization" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends paid on the given date */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Split coefficient on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was last updated */,
  "privacy_status" TEXT /* Privacy status of the portfolio (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio-stock relationship */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio that holds the stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock held in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was purchased */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector if the sector is a sub-sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sector_map" (
  "stock_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock-sector relationship */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that belongs to the sector */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector that the stock belongs to */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was assigned to the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_map_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES stock_sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_map_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value of the alert (e.g., price threshold) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_history" (
  "alert_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert history record */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that was triggered */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method used to send the notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that the news article is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Reuters, Bloomberg) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_sentiment" (
  "news_sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news sentiment record */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article that the sentiment analysis is for */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Numerical score representing the sentiment (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_sentiment_news_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_id") REFERENCES news ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "analyst_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst rating */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that the analyst rating is for */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who gave the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price given by the analyst */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm that the analyst works for */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the analyst was added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the analyst's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)
